fields.Name: STT
fields.Description: Speech-to-text. Streaming or batch transcription of audio into text. Providers: Deepgram, AssemblyAI, OpenAI Whisper, Azure Speech.

fields.Name: TTS
fields.Description: Text-to-speech. Streaming or batch synthesis of text into audio. Providers: ElevenLabs, Cartesia, Azure Speech, OpenAI.

fields.Name: RealtimeSpeech
fields.Description: Bidirectional speech-to-speech. A single model that ingests audio and emits audio (with or without native tool calling). Providers: OpenAI gpt-realtime, Google Gemini Live, ElevenLabs Conversational AI, NVIDIA PersonaPlex, Kyutai Moshi.
